string.name: crowdin_second_string_to_test
string.comment: Changing the order of the strings didn't cause a need for a new translation. Let's add this comment; if it's not removed it means the comment didn't cause a requirement for a new translation!

resources.string: This will be used to check that changing the order of strings does not require translation.

In order to ensure this string is not shown as untranslated, translate it the way you want. Probably using a single letter, so that it\'s quick. This string will never appear in ankidroid and is present here only to test crowdin feature.
This is a string with a non breakable-space using unicode.
This is a string with a non breakable-space using entity.

string.name: schedule_reminders_do_not_translate
string.comment: Do not translate this string, this feature is still in development. Name of the screen that appears when review reminders are being scheduled.

string.name: review_reminders_do_not_translate
string.comment: Do not translate this string, this feature is still in development. Name of the notification channel for review reminders.

string.name: concept_scheduler_status_do_not_translate
string.comment: Do not translate this string, this feature is still in development. Deck context-menu entry opening the concept scheduler status screen.

string.name: concept_scheduler_progress_do_not_translate
string.comment: Do not translate this string, this feature is still in development. Reviewer top-bar button that opens the concept scheduler progress panel.

string.name: concept_scheduler_tags_show
string.comment: Do not translate. Expands the concept scheduler tag panel in the note editor.

string.name: concept_scheduler_tags_hide
string.comment: Do not translate. Collapses the concept scheduler tag panel in the note editor.

string.name: concept_scheduler_kc_hint
string.comment: Do not translate. Dropdown label for the required target knowledge component.

string.name: concept_scheduler_prereq_hint
string.comment: Do not translate. Dropdown label for the optional prerequisite knowledge component.

string.name: concept_scheduler_section_hint
string.comment: Do not translate. Dropdown label for the MCAT section.

string.name: concept_scheduler_difficulty_hint
string.comment: Do not translate. Dropdown label for the required difficulty.

string.name: concept_scheduler_discrimination_hint
string.comment: Do not translate. Field label for optional IRT discrimination.

string.name: concept_scheduler_guessing_hint
string.comment: Do not translate. Field label for optional IRT guessing.

string.name: concept_scheduler_section_auto
string.comment: Do not translate. MCAT section dropdown option that auto-derives the section from the KC.

string.name: concept_scheduler_metadata_required
string.comment: Do not translate. Shown when the user tries to add a demo card without choosing KC and difficulty.

resources.string: Choose target KC and difficulty tags first.

string.name: concept_scheduler_none
string.comment: Do not translate. Dropdown option meaning no prerequisite selected.
